results.leaseVal: Two (2) renewal options, each for five (5) years, at Fair Market Value; written notice required at least 270 days prior to then-current Expiration Date
results.estoppelVal: One (1) renewal option to extend the Lease term for 5 years

results.leaseVal: 4.85% pro-rata share of Building operating expenses; annual CAM increases capped at 3% on a cumulative and compounding basis
results.estoppelVal: 4.85% pro-rata share of operating costs and CAM expenses; increases capped at 4% annually

results.leaseVal: $35,000.00 (applied to first full calendar month's Base Rent)
results.estoppelVal: No base rent prepaid in advance except for the current month's rent

results.leaseVal: Landlord obligated to maintain structural parts, mechanical elevator units, and Building electrical grids at its sole cost; exception for repairs required due to Tenant negligence. No explicit landlord default/cure provision mentioned beyond this.
results.estoppelVal: Landlord is currently in default under its repair obligations for failing to complete elevator modernization repairs on the 42nd floor, impairing tenant access
